abilities.name: 굳건한신념
abilities.description: 상대의 기술을 끌어모으는 특성이나 기술의 영향을 받지 않는다.

flavorTexts.text: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.
It digs holes on mountains, searching for food. It’s so durable that being caught in a cave-in won’t faze it.
